arts.ttl: Kalvin Phillips aims fresh swipe at under-fire Pep Guardiola with 'hurt' admission
arts.sum: Kalvin Phillips endured a difficult period at Manchester City and has opened up about his frustrations and how it dented his confidence before his loan move away

arts.ttl: Blow for Nottingham Forest as president rules out player’s January exit – Reds want to make offer
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest are one of the clubs to be credited with an interest in Corinthians’ Yuri Alberto. On November 21st, Trivela reported the Reds, Southampton and West Ham are after the 23-year-old. On Thursday, Bolavip in Brazil explained the striker will receive an offer from Nottingham Forest to leave Corinthians in the winter market. arts.ttl: “Future Harry Kane” – Club tipped to sign Ipswich Town star, feeling that ‘excellent relations’ can aid move
arts.sum: Juventus have been linked with a move for Ipswich Town’s Liam Delap over the past two weeks. The Italian side scouted the striker in Ipswich Town’s last Premier League game against Manchester United. Delap made a mark in that tie, even if he couldn’t take his goalscoring tally for the season beyond six. arts.ttl: 'Badly wrong': Jamie Carragher makes two different apologies to Nottingham Forest
Liam Delap to Chelsea or Man Utd if…
arts.sum: Liam Delap has found transfer hype over him build significantly in recent weeks following his stellar start to the season with Ipswich, and now the striker has been told Chelsea or Manchester United could move for him on one condition. It is also confirmed that Chelsea and Man Utd both admire the forward.

arts.ttl: ‘Different level’: Anthony Elanga says Chelsea have a £25m player who’s unbelievably good
arts.sum: Chelsea have a number of incredibly talented players on their books right now. From Cole Palmer to Noni Madueke, the Blues have an incredible depth...

arts.ttl: Phillips: I lost fire in my belly at Man City - Ipswich have brought it back
arts.sum: In a heartfelt interview with Sky Sports, Ipswich's Kalvin Phillips says he lost the "fire in the belly" for football in his two years at Man City before his loan move.

arts.ttl: Paul Merson makes interesting Nottingham Forest prediction after watching them get 'destroyed'
Chris Sutton gives Nottingham Forest an ultimatum as he makes his prediction for Ipswich
